zh.lifeSummary: 當Cunigunde van Cuijk於1257年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特格拉福時，她的父親Jan I van Cuijk27歲，母親Jutta von Nassau22歲。她於大約1285年與Ruprecht II. von Virneburg在海因里希_海普洛文次結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1295年被列為 gräfin von neuenahr。她去世於1328年6月20日享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cunigunde van Cuijk于1257年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特格拉福时，她的父亲Jan I van Cuijk27岁，母亲Jutta von Nassau22岁。她于大约1285年与Ruprecht II. von Virneburg在海因里希_海普洛文次结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1295年被列为 gräfin von neuenahr。她去世于1328年6月20日享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Cunigunde van Cuijk was born in 1257, in Grave, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Jan I van Cuijk, was 27 and her mother, Jutta von Nassau, was 22. She married Ruprecht II. von Virneburg about 1285, in Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1295, her occupation is listed as  gräfin von neuenahr. She died on 20 June 1328, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cunigunde van Cuijk est née en 1257, à Grave, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan I van Cuijk, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Nassau, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Ruprecht II. von Virneburg environ 1285, à Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1295, la profession de sa indiquée est  gräfin von neuenahr. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1328, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cunigunde van Cuijk 1257 in Grave, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan I van Cuijk 27 und ihre Mutter Jutta von Nassau 22. Sie hat um 1285 in Rheinprovinz, Preußen Ruprecht II. von Virneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1295 ist ihr Beruf als  gräfin von neuenahr aufgeführt. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1328 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cunigunde van Cuijk è nata il nel 1257 nel Grave, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan I van Cuijk, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Jutta von Nassau, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Ruprecht II. von Virneburg circa 1285, nel Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1295, la sua occupazione è indicata come  gräfin von neuenahr. Morì il 20 giugno 1328, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cunigunde van Cuijkが1257年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントグラブで生まれた時，父Jan I van Cuijkは27歳，母Jutta von Nassauは22歳であった。約1285年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズでRuprecht II. von Virneburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1295年，職業は gräfin von neuenahrと記録されている。彼女は1328年6月20日に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cunigunde van Cuijk(이)가 1257년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan I van Cuijk(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta von Nassau(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠에서 Ruprecht II. von Virneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1295년, 그녀의 직업은  gräfin von neuenahr이었다. 그녀는 1328년 6월 20일 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cunigunde van Cuijk nasceu em 1257, em Grave, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan I van Cuijk, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Nassau, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Ruprecht II. von Virneburg aproximadamente 1285, em Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1295, sua profissão aparece como  gräfin von neuenahr. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1328, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cunigunde van Cuijk родилась в 1257 г. в местности грав, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan I van Cuijk было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Nassau, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ruprecht II. von Virneburg около 1285 г. в местности раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1295 году она работала по профессии  gräfin von neuenahr. Она умерла 20 июня 1328 г. в возрасте 71 год.

sm.1295-1328: mai le 1295 e o'o I le 1328

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cunigunde van Cuijk nació en 1257, en Grave, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan I van Cuijk, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jutta von Nassau, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ruprecht II. von Virneburg aproximadamente 1285, en Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1295, su ocupación registrada era  gräfin von neuenahr. Murió el 20 de junio de 1328, a la edad de 71 años.
